items.briefing:
Phishing attacks are becoming more sophisticated and harder to spot, with AI now being used to craft convincing fake emails at scale — making it easier for scammers to target staff at organisations like ours. Separately, a China-linked hacking group known as TA4922 has been expanding its cybercrime activity globally, which may increase risk for Australian organisations. Google has also rolled out a new feature on Android phones that can detect suspicious calls, which is worth enabling if you use an Android device.

**Practical tip:** If an email or call feels urgent or unusual — even if it looks legitimate — pause and verify through a separate channel before clicking links or sharing information.

featured.title: Google rolls out fake call detection on Android phones
featured.quote: Fake call detection addresses widespread phone scam threat affecting Australian mobile users directly.
